name: sux
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the sux MCP server — ships the canonical `sux` skill that maps natural-language requests to the right sux tool.

plugins.name: sux-router
plugins.description: Ships the `sux` skill, which routes natural-language requests to the right tool on the sux MCP server (web search, scraping/rendering, papers, shopping, documents, transforms, pipe/batch composition).
